examples: It was actually a tricycle with a petrol motor at the rear.

A Chinese man rides a tricycle inside the Forbidden City as snow falls in Beijing on February 6, 2006.
The following 20-minute "tricycle" ride to Barangay San Miguel or Pundaquit is less so.
